channel.title: Deno on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Deno on Arrans github.io

item.title: gildas-lormeau/zip.js
item.description: JavaScript library to zip and unzip files supporting multi-core compression, compression streams, zip64, split files and encryption.

item.title: supabase/supabase
item.description: The open source Firebase alternative. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.
